user.title: Naver session cookies (optional)
user.description: Anonymous polling already works for live status, title, viewers, and follower count, so you can skip this step. Paste the NID_AUT and NID_SES cookies from chzzk.naver.com only if you need access to adult-only channels or future authenticated features. These cookies are stored once and shared by every channel you add later.

channel.title: Add your first Chzzk channel
channel.description: Paste the channel URL or the bare 32-character channel ID. You can add more channels later from this integration's Configure menu.

error.invalid_channel: Could not extract a Chzzk channel ID from that input.
error.not_found: Chzzk does not recognize this channel ID.
error.cannot_connect: Couldn't reach api.chzzk.naver.com. Check the integration's network access and try again.
error.invalid_cookies: Chzzk rejected those cookies. Open chzzk.naver.com in a browser, log in, and copy the NID_AUT and NID_SES values fresh.
error.already_added: That channel is already added to this integration.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Chzzk is already set up. Use the Configure menu on the existing entry to add or remove channels.

init.title: Chzzk
init.description: Add channels, remove channels, or refresh the shared Naver session cookies.

add_channel.title: Add a channel
add_channel.description: Paste the channel URL or the bare 32-character channel ID.

remove_channel.title: Remove a channel
remove_channel.description: Pick which channel to remove. The channel's device and entities will be cleaned up automatically.

update_cookies.title: Update Naver session cookies
update_cookies.description: Refresh the shared NID_AUT and NID_SES cookies when your previous session expires. Leave both blank to disable authenticated requests.

error.invalid_channel: Could not extract a Chzzk channel ID from that input.
error.not_found: Chzzk does not recognize this channel ID.
error.invalid_cookies: Chzzk rejected those cookies. Try copying them again from chzzk.naver.com.
error.already_added: That channel is already added to this integration.
